prefer_paths: rg as last resort only if CodeGraph tools return nothing
payload.reason: Claude (Sonnet 4.6) fell back to grep on mcp_server.cpp to find tool names instead of using find_symbol → read_symbol. This wastes tokens even before the grep fires because the decision to grep is already made. PreToolUse hook added to block it, CLAUDE.md updated with explicit prohibition and ordered fallback ladder.
payload.title: Never use grep/cat/head/tail on source files — use CodeGraph MCP tools
